ddls:
CREATE TABLE "packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the package */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the package */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the package */,
  "repository_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository the package belongs to */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the package */,
  "downloads" INTEGER /* Number of downloads */,
  "stars" INTEGER /* Number of stars or likes */,
  "forks" INTEGER /* Number of forks */,
  "issues" INTEGER /* Number of open issues */,
  "maintainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the maintainer of the package */,
  "license" TEXT /* License information of the package */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packages_maintainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("maintainer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package that has the dependency */,
  "parent_package" TEXT /* Name of the parent package */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency (e.g., import, depends) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dependency */,
  "optional" INTEGER /* Indicates if the dependency is optional */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the dependency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each import */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package that imports another package */,
  "imported_package" TEXT /* Name of the imported package */,
  "import_method" TEXT /* Method of import (e.g., whole set, selective) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the imported package */,
  "optional" INTEGER /* Indicates if the import is optional */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the import */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_imports_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each export */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package that exports another package */,
  "exported_package" TEXT /* Name of the exported package */,
  "export_method" TEXT /* Method of export (e.g., whole set, selective) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the exported package */,
  "optional" INTEGER /* Indicates if the export is optional */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the export */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exports_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package that has the version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the package */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the package version */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog for the version */,
  "download_url" TEXT /* URL to download the version */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the package in the version */,
  "compatibility" TEXT /* Compatibility information with other versions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "heaviness" (
  "heaviness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each heaviness metric */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package that has the heaviness metric */,
  "parent_package" TEXT /* Name of the parent package */,
  "heaviness_score" REAL /* Heaviness score of the package */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the heaviness score was calculated */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the heaviness score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("heaviness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_heaviness_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "required_packages" (
  "required_package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each required package */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package that requires another package */,
  "required_package" TEXT /* Name of the required package */,
  "required_version" TEXT /* Version of the required package */,
  "optional" INTEGER /* Indicates if the required package is optional */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the required package */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("required_package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_required_packages_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, maintainer, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the user account */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the package */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the package was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the package */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repositories" (
  "repository_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repository */,
  "repository_name" TEXT /* Name of the repository */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* URL of the repository */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the repository */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the repository */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the repository */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repository_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_repositories" (
  "package_repository_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package repository */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package in the repository */,
  "repository_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the package in the repository */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the package in the repository */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_repository_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_repositories_repository_id FOREIGN KEY ("repository_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repository_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_repositories_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package that triggered the notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, failed) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., update, issue) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)
